dashboard.label: Account
dashboard.title: Chibi Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your monthly image credits, review recent generations, and keep creating chibi avatars, stickers, and character art.
dashboard.login_title: Log in to save your chibi history
dashboard.login_desc: Anonymous generations still work from the homepage. Logging in gives you monthly plan credits and a private history.
dashboard.recent_desc: Your latest generated images appear here after creation.
